options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies the name of the power database file

options.name: -hierarchy
options.description: Specifies to map each instance in the file with a prefixN/instance (for example, prefixA/inst) in the flat netlist, where '/' is the hierarchy seperator. Default : all. prefix

options.name: -hierarchy_separator
options.description: Specifies the separator character in the hierarchical net names, bus names, and pin names. Default : slash ( / )
